creator: greid@ukug.uk.FreeBSD.org
text:
On Fri, 22 Dec 2000, George Reid wrote:

> [SNIP PR ports/23833]

Sorry, I submitted the wrong shar. This diff patches it to the correct
archive - fixes dependency and distinfo problem.

[BEGIN DIFF]

--- spambnc.shar.orig	Mon Dec 25 16:33:12 2000
+++ spambnc.shar	Mon Dec 25 19:08:55 2000
@@ -29,10 +29,12 @@
 XCATEGORIES=     	mail
 XMASTER_SITES=   	http://www.spambouncer.org/
 XDISTFILES=		spambnc.tar.Z index.shtml
+XEXTRACT_ONLY=		spambnc.tar.Z
 X
 XMAINTAINER=		greid@ukug.uk.freebsd.org
 X
-XEXTRACT_ONLY=		spambnc.tar.Z
+XRUN_DEPENDS=		${LOCALBASE}/bin/fetchmail:${PORTSDIR}/mail/fetchmail
+X
 XIGNOREFILES=		index.shtml
 XNO_WRKSUBDIR=		yes
 XNO_BUILD=		yes
@@ -57,7 +59,7 @@
 END-of-spambnc/Makefile
 echo x - spambnc/distinfo
 sed 's/^X//' >spambnc/distinfo << 'END-of-spambnc/distinfo'
-XMD5 (index.shtml) = 15891143f78d46975217c03e6bef227e
+XMD5 (index.shtml) = IGNORE
 XMD5 (spambnc.tar.Z) = ed1cb1a24cadf02bebad19965165e751
 END-of-spambnc/distinfo
 echo x - spambnc/pkg-message

[END DIFF]

"And then it comes to be that the soothing light
   at the end of your tunnel was just a freight
            train, comin' your way."

      George Reid * greid@ukug.uk.freebsd.org
